pre_animation: variable.hand_bob = query.life_time < 0.01 ? 0.0 : variable.hand_bob + ((query.is_on_ground && query.is_alive ? math.clamp(math.sqrt(math.pow(query.position_delta(0), 2.0) + math.pow(query.position_delta(2), 2.0)), 0.0, 0.1) : 0.0) - variable.hand_bob) * 0.02;
v.swords = v.diamond_sword || v.netherite_sword || v.golden_sword || v.iron_sword || v.stone_sword || v.wooden_sword || v.honey_bottle;

v.items = v.bow || v.crossbow || v.tools || v.cauldron || v.charcoal || v.coal || v.flint_and_steel || v.flower_pot || v.shears || v.string || v.apple || v.enchanted_golden_apple || v.baked_potato || v.beef || v.beetroot_soup || v.beetroot || v.bread || v.carrot || v.chorus_fruit || v.tropical_fish || v.cooked_beef || v.cooked_chicken || v.cooked_cod || v.cooked_mutton || v.cooked_porkchop || v.cooked_rabbit || v.cooked_salmon || v.cookie || v.dried_kelp || v.golden_apple || v.golden_carrot || v.melon_slice || v.milk_bucket || v.mushroom_stew || v.mutton || v.poisonous_potato || v.porkchop || v.potato || v.pufferfish || v.pumpkin_pie || v.rabbit_stew || v.chicken || v.cod || v.rabbit || v.salmon || v.rotten_flesh || v.spider_eye || v.suspicious_stew || v.sweet_berries || v.potion || v.glow_berries;

v.is_enchanted_helmet = q.armor_material_slot(0) == 1 || q.armor_material_slot(0) == 3; v.is_enchanted_chestplate = q.armor_material_slot(1) == 1 || q.armor_material_slot(1) == 3; v.is_enchanted_leggings = q.armor_material_slot(2) == 1 || q.armor_material_slot(2) == 3; v.is_enchanted_boots = q.armor_material_slot(3) == 1 || q.armor_material_slot(3) == 3;
